decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is clean, but the 04:00 snapshot still shows the exhausted April 23 daily board instead of a fresh April 24 slate.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77726.83, with price still below the short-term highs and shorts dominant, but the only live active thesis position remains the weekly 80k reach around 34%, while the old weekly 72k dip is just a discarded legacy position. At this 04:00 UTC snapshot, the daily board is still the stale April 23 slate: all relevant daily markets shown are effectively resolved at near-zero and therefore unusable for a new Apr 24 decision. Under the playbook, there is no reason to force a fresh trade off exhausted prior-session dailies. The weekly 80k reach is not in the 90-95% take-profit zone and does not require management. The next weekly upside strike, 82k reach, is only about 8%, too weak to justify a secondary weekly slot. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k reach and wait for a clean April 24 daily slate before considering any new position.
